name: business-writing-prompt
prompt: Use claude-prompt-refiner to improve this rough prompt: Make this email sound better and less rude.
expected_behavior: Returns a paste-ready Claude prompt with audience, tone, preservation constraints, and output format.

name: coding-agent-prompt
prompt: Use claude-prompt-refiner to rewrite: Fix this bug in my app.
expected_behavior: Adds codebase inspection, implementation scope, verification, safety boundaries, and final reporting requirements.

name: long-document-analysis-prompt
prompt: Use claude-prompt-refiner to rewrite: Summarize all these PDFs and tell me what matters.
expected_behavior: Structures source documents, task, grounding requirements, citations or source references, and decision-oriented output.
